voice.tone: Technical and direct. Speaks to data engineers.
voice.errors: Diagnostic and log-formatted. Include job IDs, timestamps, and stack traces. Suggest fixes or link to docs.
voice.loading: Terminal-style progress bars with percentage. Pipeline nodes show blinking status indicators. Log lines stream in real-time.
voice.empty_states: Terminal-style. An empty pipeline workspace shows a blinking cursor prompt inviting the user to create their first pipeline. No decoration.
